flags.note: berkan — only the widget starter names a university; nothing establishes the texter is the student. ogrenci wrongly applied.
berkan — lead never answered the gender question; 'Erkek' came from the bot's 'Academia Seyrantepe ... erkek öğrenci yurdumuzdur' pitch text, not the lead.
emaan — lead said 'Istanbul Kent University Beyoğlu' / 'Kent university istanbul'; written as MSGSÜ-Beşiktaş (wrong). The 'beyoğlu' token matched the MSGSÜ campus alias.
Bülent Öztürk — engaged throughout (price, location, room, washing machine); no explicit disinterest. ilgilenmiyor wrongly applied.
İskender Aga — 'İstanbul üniversitesi Amerikan Dili edebiyatı bölümünde'; withheld (multi-campus, faculty didn't resolve to a campus).
Nuray — 'Boğaziçi Üniversitesi' in the widget starter; withheld (multi-campus, no campus stated). Flagged as the main-campus default per developer.
A.Kaya — universitede present last run, absent this run; developer flags as tricky/marginal (veli with a daughter at Biruni).
Sıla — 'Kız öğrenci', '2.sınıfı bitirdim yaz stajı' = self-enrollment; veli wrongly applied.
İbrahim — İstanbul Aydın Üniversitesi is in İstanbul (not out-of-city); bot said '1-2 ay içerisinde ... lokasyon bulmaya çalışacağız'. hizmet-veremiyoruz wrong.
İbrahim — 'we may have a location in 1-2 months' is the deal_awaiting case, not permanent can't-service.

converter_notes: Farhan (1138): 'Bahcesehir university' NOT written — NOT a language-support failure. 'bahcesehir' matches the Bahçeşehir parent, which is multi-campus (Kuzey/Çırağan/Tıp) with no plain list value, and the lead stated no campus → bilinmiyor-kampus is a defensible withhold. Left unflagged (consistent with run 1's Farhan).
İbrahim (1359): developer noted ogrenci 'was not flagged', but ogrenci IS present in the current Chatwoot labels (hizmet-veremiyoruz, ogrenci, universitede) — not an error, so not flagged.
emaan (559): missing ogrenci not flagged — developer attributes it to English-language support and asked to exclude it.
A.Kaya (977): university is now correctly written (Biruni Üniversitesi) — an improvement over run 1 where it was withheld.
